description.para: The following are device configuration options.
See the XXxvEthernet_SetOptions, XXxvEthernet_ClearOptions and XXxvEthernet_GetOptions routines for information on how to use options.
The default state of the options are also noted below.

briefdescription.para: < XXE_FCS_STRIP_OPTION specifies the Xxv Ethernet device to strip FCS and PAD from received frames.

detaileddescription.para: This driver sets this option to enabled (set) by default.XXE_FCS_INSERT_OPTION specifies the Xxv Ethernet device to generate the FCS field and add PAD automatically for outgoing frames. This driver sets this option to enabled (set) by default.

briefdescription.para: XXE_TRANSMITTER_ENABLE_OPTION specifies the Xxv Ethernet device transmitter to be enabled.

detaileddescription.para: This driver sets this option to enabled (set) by default.

briefdescription.para: XXE_RECEIVER_ENABLE_OPTION specifies the Xxv Ethernet device receiver to be enabled.

detaileddescription.para: This driver sets this option to enabled (set) by default.

briefdescription.para: XXE_DEFAULT_OPTIONS specify the options set in XXxvEthernet_Reset() and XXxvEthernet_CfgInitialize()

sectiondef.header: Reset and Address Filter (RAF) Register bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XAE_RAF_OFFSET register.

briefdescription.para: Statistics Counter Reset.
Receive Bad Frame Enable.

sectiondef.header: Transmit Inter-Frame Gap Adjustment Register (TFGP) bit definitions

briefdescription.para: Transmit inter-frame gap adjustment value.

sectiondef.header: Other Constant definitions used in the driver

briefdescription.para: Speed of 10 Gbps.
Number of loops in the driver API to wait for before returning a failure case.
Timeout in ticks used while checking if the core had come out of reset.

detaileddescription.para: The exact tick time is defined in each case/loop where it will be used

briefdescription.para: This typedef contains configuration information for a Xxv Ethernet device.
struct XXxvEthernet is the type for Xxv Ethernet driver instance data.

detaileddescription.para: The calling code is required to use a unique instance of this structure for every Xxv Ethernet device used in the system. A reference to a structure of this type is then passed to the driver API functions.

briefdescription.para: XXxvEthernet_CfgInitialize initializes an XXV Ethernet device along with the InstancePtr that references it.

parameterdescription.para: references the memory instance to be associated with the XXV Ethernet core instance upon initialization.
references the structure holding the hardware configuration for the Xxv Ethernet core to initialize.

is the processor address used to access the base address of the XXV Ethernet instance. In systems with an MMU and virtual memory, EffectiveAddress is the virtual address mapped to the physical in ConfigPtr->Config.BaseAddress. In systems without an active MMU, EffectiveAddress should be set to the same value as ConfigPtr->Config.BaseAddress.

briefdescription.para: XXxvEthernet_Initialize initializes an XXV Ethernet device along with the InstancePtr that references it.

detaileddescription.para: The PHY is setup independently from the Ethernet core. Use the MII or whatever other interface may be present for setup.

parameterdescription.para: references the memory instance to be associated with the AXI Ethernet core instance upon initialization.
references the structure holding the hardware configuration for the Axi Ethernet core to initialize.

simplesect.para: When user calls this function he should ensure the hardware is in a quiescent state by resetting all the hardware Configurations.

briefdescription.para: XXxvEthernet_Start starts the Xxv Ethernet device as follows:

para.verbatim: - Enable transmitter if XXE_TRANSMIT_ENABLE_OPTION is set - Enable receiver if XXE_RECEIVER_ENABLE_OPTION is set - Upon enabling RX, check for RX BLOCK LOCK bit to make sure RX channel is ready.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Xxv Ethernet instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: XST_FAILURE if RX is enabled and BLOCK LOCK is not set.

briefdescription.para: XXxvEthernet_Stop gracefully stops the Xxv Ethernet device by disabling the receiver.

detaileddescription.para: XXxvEthernet_Stop does not modify any of the current device options.
Since the transmitter is not disabled, frames currently in internal buffers or in process by a DMA engine are allowed to be transmitted.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Xxv Ethernet instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XXxvEthernet_Reset does not perform a soft reset of the XxvEthernet core.

detaileddescription.para: XxvEthernet hardware is reset by the device connected to the AXI4-Stream interface i.e. MCDMA. This function simply disabled TX and RX. This function inserts some delay before proceeding to stop the device.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Xxv Ethernet instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XXxvEthernet_SetOptions enables the options, Options for the Xxv Ethernet, specified by InstancePtr.

detaileddescription.para: Xxv Ethernet should be stopped with XXxvEthernet_Stop() before changing options.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Xxv Ethernet instance to be worked on.
is a bitmask of OR'd XXE_*_OPTION values for options to set. Options not specified are not affected.

listitem.para: XST_DEVICE_IS_STARTED if the device has not been stopped.

simplesect.para: See xxxvethernet.h for a description of the available options.

briefdescription.para: XXxvEthernet_ClearOptions clears the options, Options for the Xxv Ethernet, specified by InstancePtr.

detaileddescription.para: Xxv Ethernet should be stopped with XXxvEthernet_Stop() before changing options.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Xxv Ethernet instance to be worked on.
is a bitmask of OR'd XXE_*_OPTION values for options to clear. Options not specified are not affected.

listitem.para: XST_DEVICE_IS_STARTED if the device has not been stopped.

simplesect.para: See xxxvethernet.h for a description of the available options.

briefdescription.para: XXxvEthernet_GetOptions returns the current option settings.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Xxv Ethernet instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: Returns a bitmask of XXE_*_OPTION constants, each bit specifying an option that is currently active.
See xxxvethernet.h for a description of the available options.

briefdescription.para: XXxvEthernet_SetUsxgmiiRateAndDuplex sets the speed and duplex ability in USXGMII Autonegotiation register.

parameterdescription.para: references the Xxv Ethernet on which to operate.
to be set - currently only 1G and 2.5G are tested. Pass RATE_1G or RATE_2G5 to the function.
FD or HD - if 0 Half duplex is set, else Full duplex.

simplesect.para:
- XST_SUCCESS on successful setting of speed.
XST_FAILURE, if the speed cannot be set for the present hardware configuration.

briefdescription.para: Looks up the device configuration based on the unique device ID/BaseAddress.

detaileddescription.para: A table contains the configuration info for each device in the system.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the device

simplesect.para: A pointer to the configuration table entry corresponding to the given device ID/BaseAddress, or NULL if no match is found.
In XSCT/classic flow, DeviceId is used to look up the device configuration.

briefdescription.para: XXxvEthernet_GetAutoNegSpeed reports the speed (only 10G supported) from the Autonegotiation status register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Xxv Ethernet instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: Returns the link speed in units of gigabits per second (10) Can return a value of 0, in case 10Gbps is not set.
This function is only supported for XXV Ethernet MAC

briefdescription.para: XXxvEthernet_SetAutoNegSpeed sets the speed (only 10G supported) in the Autonegotiation control register.

parameterdescription.para: references the Xxv Ethernet on which to operate.

simplesect.para:
- XST_SUCCESS on successful setting of speed.
XST_FAILURE, if the speed cannot be set for the present hardware configuration.
This function is only supported for XXV Ethernet MAC

briefdescription.para: XXxvEthernet_UsxgmiiAnMainReset sets the USXGMII AN Main reset.

detaileddescription.para: A delay is provided in between setting and clearing the main reset bit.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Xxv Ethernet instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: This function is only supported for USXGMII Ethernet MAC

briefdescription.para: XXxvEthernet_UsxgmiiAnMainRestart sets the USXGMII AN Main restart.

detaileddescription.para: A delay is provided in between setting and clearing this bit as it is not self clearing.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Xxv Ethernet instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: This function is only supported for USXGMII Ethernet MAC

briefdescription.para: XXxvEthernet_LookupConfigBaseAddr returns a reference to an XXxvEthernet_Config structure based on base address.

detaileddescription.para: The return value will refer to an entry in the device configuration table defined in the xxxvethernet_g.c file.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the device to lookup for.

listitem.para: Returns a reference to a config record in the configuration table (in xxxvethernet_g.c) corresponding to Baseaddr, or NULL
NULL if no match is found.

memberdef.name: XXE_MTU
memberdef.initializer: 1500 /* Max MTU size of an Ethernet * frame */

memberdef.name: XXE_JUMBO_MTU
memberdef.initializer: 8982 /* Max MTU size of a jumbo * Ethernet frame */

briefdescription.para: XXxvEthernet_IsStarted reports if the device is in the started or stopped state.

detaileddescription.para: To be in the started state, the calling code must have made a successful call to XXxvEthernet_Start. To be in the stopped state, XXxvEthernet_Stop or XXxvEthernet_CfgInitialize function must have been called.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the of Xxv Ethernet instance to be worked on.

listitem.para: TRUE if the device has been started.
FALSE.if the device has not been started

briefdescription.para: XXxvEthernet_XxvDevBaseAddress reports the base address of the core connected to the Xxv Ethernet's Axi4 Stream interface (expected to be MCDMA).

detaileddescription.para: This function is currently not in use because of limitation in exporting target MCDMA information.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Xxv Ethernet instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: The base address of the core connected to the Xxv Ethernet's streaming interface.

briefdescription.para: XXxvEthernet_IsTxErr determines if there is any TX error reported by device.

detaileddescription.para: The TX status register is read for this to be determined.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Xxv Ethernet instance to be worked on.

listitem.para: TRUE if error bit mask is set
FALSE if error bit mask is not set

briefdescription.para: XXxvEthernet_IsRxErr determines if there is any RX error reported by device.

detaileddescription.para: The RX status register is read for this to be determined.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Xxv Ethernet instance to be worked on.

listitem.para: TRUE if error bit mask is set
FALSE if error bit mask is not set

briefdescription.para: XXxvEthernet_GetStatus returns the contents of status register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Xxv Ethernet instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XXxvEthernet_IsStatsConfigured returns determines if Statistics gathering.

detaileddescription.para: is configured in the hardware or not.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Xxv Ethernet instance to be worked on.

listitem.para: TRUE if the device is configured with statistics gathering.
FALSE if the device is NOT configured with statistics gathering.

briefdescription.para: XXxvEthernet_UsxgmiiLinkSts returns the USXGMII link status.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Xxv Ethernet instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XXxvEthernet_SetUsxgmiiAnEnable enables USXGMII autonegotiation.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Xxv Ethernet instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XXxvEthernet_SetUsxgmiiAnBypass bypasses USXGMII autonegotiation.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Xxv Ethernet instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XXxvEthernet_GetUsxgmiiAnSts returns the contents of USXGMII autonegotiation status register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Xxv Ethernet instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XXxvEthernet_IsMcDma reports if the device is currently connected to MCDMA.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Xxv Ethernet instance to be worked on.

listitem.para: TRUE if the Xxv Ethernet device is connected MCDMA.
FALSE.if the Xxv Ethernet device is NOT connected to MCDMA

memberdef.name: XXxvEthernet_reg_name
memberdef.initializer: (((RegOffset) == XXE_GRR_OFFSET) ? "XXE_GRR_OFFSET": \ ((RegOffset) == XXE_RST_OFFSET) ? "XXE_RST_OFFSET": \ ((RegOffset) == XXE_MODE_OFFSET) ? "XXE_MODE_OFFSET": \ ((RegOffset) == XXE_TXCFG_OFFSET) ? "XXE_TXCFG_OFFSET": \ ((RegOffset) == XXE_RXCFG_OFFSET) ? "XXE_RXCFG_OFFSET": \ ((RegOffset) == XXE_RXMTU_OFFSET) ? "XXE_RXMTU_OFFSET": \ ((RegOffset) == XXE_TICK_OFFSET) ? "XXE_TICK_OFFSET": \ ((RegOffset) == XXE_REV_OFFSET) ? "XXE_REV_OFFSET": \ ((RegOffset) == XXE_TXSR_OFFSET) ? "XXE_TXSR_OFFSET": \ ((RegOffset) == XXE_RXSR_OFFSET) ? "XXE_RXSR_OFFSET": \ ((RegOffset) == XXE_SR_OFFSET) ? "XXE_SR_OFFSET": \ ((RegOffset) == XXE_RXBLSR_OFFSET) ? "XXE_RXBLSR_OFFSET": \ ((RegOffset) == XXE_ANSR_OFFSET) ? "XXE_ANSR_OFFSET": \ ((RegOffset) == XXE_ANASR_OFFSET) ? "XXE_ANASR_OFFSET": \ "unknown")

briefdescription.para: XXxvEthernet_ReadReg returns the value read from the register specified by RegOffset.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the Xxv Ethernet device.
is the offset of the register to be read.

simplesect.para: Returns the 32-bit value of the register.
C-style signature: u32 XXxvEthernet_ReadReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset)

briefdescription.para: XXxvEthernet_WriteReg, writes Data to the register specified by RegOffset.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the Xxv Ethernet device.
is the offset of the register to be written.
is the 32-bit value to write to the register.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XXxvEthernet_WriteReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset, u32 Data)

briefdescription.para: This file implements all the XXV ethernet functions to initialize, start, stop, reset and reconfigure the MAC.

detaileddescription.para: This file contains static initialization functionality for XXV Ethernet driver.
This file contains definitions for register offset, masks and low level hardware functions.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 hk 6/16/17 First release hk 2/15/18 Add support for USXGMII 1.4 rsp 5/08/20 Remove unused variable in usxgmii autoneg reset and restart function.

Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 hk 6/16/17 First release hk 2/15/18 Add support for USXGMII 1.5 sk 10/18/20 Correct the Auto-Negotiation ability macro name (XXE_ANA_OFFSET) with XXE_ANASR_OFFSET.

Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 hk 6/16/17 First release 1.1 mj 3/30/18 Add XXxvEthernet_LookupConfigBaseAddr(UINTPTR Baseaddr) API to lookup config by base address.
